div.p: Concurrent updates resolved via logical timestamps + deterministic tiebreaker

g.text: All nodes converge to this value
Determinism | All nodes reach same value
Convergence | O(log N) rounds after partition heal
No Coordination | No locks or consensus needed
Data Loss | One concurrent write discarded
No Causality | Logical time ≠ real time
Tiebreaker Arbitrary | Node ID has no semantic meaning
Not Suitable For | Counters, financial data
Space | O(N) per key (N = cluster size)

text.tspan: // Rule 2: Versions equal → node ID tiebreaker
// Higher node ID wins (deterministic, all nodes agree)
// Rule 2: Versions equal → node ID tiebreaker
// Higher node ID wins (deterministic, all nodes agree)

g.text: 3. Both detect: same version, need full entry exchange
5. Result: Both nodes store Entry C
